Ok(
    RateLimit {
        status: "allowed_warning",
        resets_at: Some(
            1776042000,
        ),
        session_id: "abc",
        rate_limit_type: Some(
            "seven_day",
        ),
        utilization: Some(
            0.57,
        ),
        is_using_overage: Some(
            false,
        ),
    },
)
